chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Boundaries of Mina, Arafat, and Muzdalifah

text: 2981 - وَ فِي خَبَرٍ آخَرَ قَالَ : «أَصْحَابُ اَلْأَرَاكِ لاَ حَجَّ لَهُمْ وَ هُمُ اَلَّذِينَ يَقِفُونَ تَحْتَ اَلْأَرَاكِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2981 - In another narration, Imam (as) said:
"Those who stand under the Araak trees have no valid Hajj, as they are not within the designated standing area (Arafat)."
